title: poa collina
intro: Poa collina, also known as blue grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Poa collina include reducing inflammation, soothing irritated skin and mucous membranes, and alleviating symptoms of allergies and colds. Poa collina can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
